item.name: GET /students/me - non-student valid token should return 403

request.description: Set nonStudentAccessToken to a valid admin/faculty token to verify RolesGuard returns 403. If this variable is empty/invalid, 401 is expected because JwtAuthGuard rejects first.

exec: pm.test("Response uses standard JSON envelope", function () {
pm.test("Role guard behavior is correct", function () {

item.name: 06 - Auth Logout and Change Password Manual

request.description: Run manually at the end. It revokes current access token and clears refresh token.

exec: pm.test("Response uses standard JSON envelope", function () {
pm.test("Logout succeeds when token is valid", function () {

request.description: Manual only. After password change, current tokens are revoked. Login again with newPassword and update studentPassword if you want to continue.
